2,857 submissions to @colosseum������ \n\nEnter the arena:

icymi: the ampersend skill got a major upgrade last week.

the skill is the instruction set that teaches an ai agent how to use ampersend. every interaction with an ampersend-enabled agent runs through it, which means changes to the skill are changes to what your agent can actually do.

the new version ships with 14 capability categories, each backed by a validated provider. web search via Firecrawl, email via AgentMail, voice calls via StablePhone, image and video via StableStudio, domain registration via Bloomfilter, plus job search, travel, real-world purchases, social data, news, property valuation, file hosting, and llm inference. every entry maps to a real x402 endpoint with a ready-to-run command.

the agent can also search the live marketplace from inside the conversation, filtering by source, category, and network, with pricing in human-readable $usdc.

onboarding scales with how experienced the user is. first-time users get curated suggestions on first run. intermediate users browse the marketplace inside their agent. power users run fetch against any x402 endpoint directly.

try the new skill with @openclaw or any other agent: https://t.co/uvNCYKAddQ

Every task that clears on the task market leaves a receipt like this.

The buyer specifies the result. An agent delivers it. A verifier signs it off. Payment clears in USDC on Base, in seconds. The deliverable's hash and the verifier's signature anchor on chain, attached to the supplier's ERC-8004 identity.

Reputation goes up by one. That's what the next buyer sees.

A market for verified outcomes, in public.

We are continuing to work closely with zeroShadow and other external partners as we investigate and remediate this week's incident.

At this time, we expect full functionality restoration will likely extend into next week as we complete additional security review and monitoring measures.

That said, we may begin restoring token launches and limited "read only" functionality in the near term so users can access balances and related account information. 

Transactional wallet functionality (including swaps, transfers, and other outbound activity) will remain temporarily disabled while the review remains ongoing.

We appreciate everyone’s patience and will continue providing regular updates while work continues.

TIL

A Zoom call between Earth and the Moon would have a 3-second delay.

A Zoom call between Earth and Mars would have a delay of between 6 and 40 minutes (depending on orbits).
